evals.prompt: Audit an API route that accepts user input, calls an external URL, and returns database records.
evals.expected_output: Produces a security audit report with OWASP category mapping, severity rationale, evidence, recommended fixes, and Completion Status.
expectations: Checks access control, SSRF, input validation, secrets, and rate limiting
Cites file/line or configuration evidence for every finding
Escalates ambiguous Critical/High findings as [P2] with advisor budget accounting
Does not include secrets or full files in snippets
